previousDayImpact: France's victory over Morocco created significant separation, rewarding Team Godfather and Bijan Mustard with 20 points each.
Entries backing Morocco, including Team Pahl and Team Mack, saw no scoring gains, causing them to lose ground in the standings.
leaderboardSummary: Team Godfather surged into first place, climbing two spots with their 20-point gain.
Bijan Mustard also climbed two spots to reach seventh place following their successful pick of France.
Team Jordan and Team Pahl each slipped one position in the rankings despite no change to their point totals.
leverageWatch: Team Mack, Team Camouflage Cndm, and Metcalf Hurts all share Spain, making their performance a critical focal point for their respective standings.
Team koyn holds a unique interest in Belgium, providing an opportunity to gain ground on the field if they advance.
